latest.description: Model Once, Run Anywhere with Shared Kubernetes Infrastructure

latest.title: AWS Community Builders Spotlight: Week of April 6, 2026
latest.description: Weekly digest of AWS Community Builders' best content from April 6-12, 2026. Technical guides on Lambda, Bedrock, MCP servers, Valkey, and more.

latest.title: Beyond the Classroom: What Every Student Needs to Know About Building on AWS
latest.description: A guide for student developers on navigating the AWS ecosystem, from managing the Free Tier to leveraging student-specific resources like AWS Educate.

latest.title: Secure Agent Sandboxes for Programmatic Tool Calling on AWS: Firecracker and gVisor on EKS
latest.description: Building isolated code execution environments for AI agents that write and run untrusted Python with inline tool calling

latest.title: Beyond the Pilot: Why the "Frontier Firm" Needs a Graph Intelligence Layer
latest.description: We are moving away from simple "Chatbots" toward "Agentic Ecosystems." However, there is a looming bottleneck: Knowledge Fragmentation.

latest.title: Building a Secure, Scalable Platform on AWS
latest.description: Modern cloud-native applications demand automation, security, and scalability from day one. This architecture demonstrates how to combine GitOps, Infrastructure as Code, and managed Kubernetes to build a production-ready delivery platform on AWS.

latest.title: [EN] S3 Files: a detailed add-on
latest.description: Important technical notes, relevant and supplementary, based on the announcement of the S3 Files functionality in the S3 service to understand it: a new way to access

latest.title: [ES] S3 Files: un complemento detallado
latest.description: Notas técnicas importantes relevantes y complementarias basado en el anuncio de la funcionalidad de S3 Files en el servicio de S3 para entenderlo: una nueva forma de acceder objetos de S3 como archivos y carpetas

latest.title: Building a Scalable Serverless Workflow on AWS
latest.description: Modern applications demand scalability, resilience, and cost efficiency—and serverless architecture delivers exactly that. In this post, we’ll walk through a powerful event-driven workflow built entirely on Amazon Web Services using core managed services.

latest.title: The Art of Hybrid Development: Optimizing Application Lifecycles with Kiro Pro and AWS
latest.description: A technical deep-dive based on real-world implementation experiences, detailing a high-performance workflow using Kiro Pro. We explore how to effectively segment the development process: from architecture and code generation in IDE environments (Windows) to rigorous deployment, least-privilege analysis, and automated technical documentation via CLI (Linux). This is designed for engineers looking to maximize the efficiency of AWS MCPs and advanced LLMs.

trending.title: Introducing Article View Counts on AWS Builder Center
trending.description: You can now see how many builders are reading your articles, giving you a real metric to understand the reach of your content.

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Caligo Dynamics - AI Powered Autonomous Drone Swarm for Emergency Response
trending.description: When a fire breaks out, firefighters often enter buildings blindly, unable to see victims, hazards, or even the way out. This project uses AI-powered drone swarms built with ROS2, PX4, Kiro, and Amazon Bedrock to detect fires, locate civilians, map dangerous environments, and help emergency teams contain fires before lives are lost.

trending.title: Revolutionizing Email Productivity with AI-Powered Automation through CLI
trending.description: As a developer facing email overload, I built a solution for the Q Developer Challenge #1: email management. What began as a simple CLI tool grew into an AI-powered system that has transformed my workflow.

trending.title: Amazon S3 Files: from Kafka to S3 via NFS
trending.description: A hands-on demo of Amazon S3 Files with Confluent Cloud Kafka, Lambda, and AWS CDK. I show how Kafka events can be written to an S3-backed NFS mount using normal filesystem calls, what CDK still gets wrong today, and how cold vs warm reads behave for small and large files in real runs.

trending.title: El problema de los Small Files: Guía de optimización en S3
trending.description: Descubre por qué el exceso de archivos pequeños destruye el rendimiento de Spark, Glue y Athena. Aprende estrategias de compactación, control de particionamiento y optimización de tamaño (128MB-512MB) para reducir costos y acelerar tus pipelines de datos hasta 10 veces.

trending.title: 10,000 AIdeas Competition Terms (Spanish)
trending.description: Terms for the 10,000 AIdeas Competition, in Spanish Language

trending.title: Agentic Branding: Let Kiro Turn Your CV into a Cloud-Native Website
trending.description: In this guide, I am going to use AWS Kiro (the intelligent AI agent) to automate a professional transformation. I'll take your existing LinkedIn profile data and, with just three prompts, have Kiro build a modern, cloud-native static portfolio website using Next.js and Tailwind CSS and deploy it on S3.

trending.title: Cómo crear un agente de IA desde cero. Open source, local y gratis.
trending.description: De un modelo que solo responde a uno que busca, razona y recuerda. Todo con código que puedes leer, forkear y contribuir.

trending.title: Strands Agents & AgentCore: Two Pieces of the Same Puzzle
trending.description: A practical breakdown of two complementary AWS tools for building AI agents: Strands Agents, the open-source SDK for writing agent logic, and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, the managed platform for running agents securely in production.
